# Completion Follow-up

After completing any user-requested task in this workspace, ask whether there are any other needs to complete.

Preferred behavior:

1. Finish the requested task first.
2. Provide the result or summary.
3. After the task is complete, use the available ask-question tool to ask: "是否还有其他需求需要完成？"
4. Keep the follow-up short and operational.

If the ask-question tool is unavailable, end the response with a direct follow-up question asking whether the user wants anything else completed.

Do not ask the follow-up question before the task is complete.
